entry.title: freeCodeCamp's 2022 Become-a-Dev Challenge
entry.summary: I am taking the 2022 Become-a-Dev Challenge, will you join me?
entry.content:
Quincy Larson, founder of freeCodeCamp, created a new year's resolution challenge called 2022 Become-a-Dev which consists of of 4 steps.

  1. Max out your stats in Learn ToCode RPG
  2. Start #100DaysOfCode (which I already started)
  3. Complete the freeCodeCamp Relational Database Certification
  4. Publish 3 tutorials on your Hashnode blog (I plan on publishing mine here.)

If you are up for the challenge quote-retweet this tweet with the words "I'm in."

Also checkout my #100DaysOfCode log. Recently I have been learning a lot about Python & I write about helpful insights that I pick up on the way. Good luck with the challenge!

entry.title: 👋 Welcome to my Website!
entry.content:
Introduction

My name is Tyler Hillery! I made this website using Pelican, a static site generator that uses Python.

There are a few reasons for this website:

  1. A place to showcase some of the projects I am working on.
  2. Somewhere I can write about what I am learning.
  3. Creating the website was a project in itself to help improve on my Python, Git, HTML & CSS skills.

If any of the below areas interest you, keep an eye out for future posts!

Areas of Interest

  • Data & Analytics Engineering
  • The Modern Data Stack
  • Machine-Learning
  • Data Science
  • Computer Science
  • Finance & Investments
  • Learning
  • Technology
  • Web Development
  • Open Source
  • Sports (Basketball, Football, Golf)
  • Fitness (Lifting, Running, Biking, Hiking)

Specific Tooling I plan on Learning About

  • PostgresSQL & More advanced SQL techniques
  • Applied Data Science with Python (NumPy, Pandas)
  • API development using backend frameworks such as Django, Flask & Fast API
  • Workflow Orchestration Tools (Airflow, Dagster, Prefect)
  • Data Build Tool (dbt)
  • Cloud Technologies (AWS, GCP, Snowflake)
  • Data Visualization Tools (Looker, Preset, Dash, D3.js)
  • NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis)
  • Data Ingestion Tools (Airbyte, Meltano)
  • Apache Spark & Apache Kafka
  • Scala
  • DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes, TerraForm, CI/CD)
  • Basic Web Development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
  • Web Frameworks (Tailwinds, HTMX, Alpine.js, Vue.js)
